_comment: Hero silhouette manifest for the procedural portrait pipeline. Bonsai-Image-4B-generated faceless silhouettes, one per template. generate-heroes.sh reads this; export-heroes-to-app.sh post-processes raw output into apps/web/public/img/heroes/templates/<templateId>.png. Each hero has a fixed seed so re-runs are deterministic and regenerating one hero never disturbs the rest. Subject strings follow the §6.5 grammar in docs/design/HERO_PORTRAITS.md.
preamble: Single game character silhouette. One isolated full-body figure, centered, no scene, no ground, no background details.

style.silhouette: Style: a single full-body faceless figure rendered as a near-black silhouette with subtle antique gold edge lighting from the upper left. ABSOLUTELY no visible face — the face is fully concealed by a helmet, mask, hood, veil, or other culturally-appropriate covering. Color: deep matte black (#0a0a0a) silhouette with antique gold (#C9A961) rim light on a pure solid white (#FFFFFF) background, so the figure can be cleanly alpha-keyed off the white background in post-processing.

tail: Composition: perfectly centered, square 1:1, the figure fills roughly the central 70% of the frame on a clean uniform solid white background. Figure only — absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no scene, no decoration, no shadow on the ground.

heroes.subject: A Roman centurion, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a transverse-crested galea, the visor a single dark band; wearing lorica segmentata in fluted steel bands; gladius lowered at the hip; scutum slung at the back.

A Norse raider, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by an iron spangenhelm with a wide nose-guard and cheek-plates leaving only shadow; wearing chainmail under a fur-trimmed raider's cloak; a single-handed bearded axe raised in the right hand; a round wooden shield with iron boss strapped to the left arm.

A Silk Road caravan trader, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a wound turban with a long cloth tail drawn across the lower face as a desert veil; wearing a long brocaded silk merchant's robe with a wide sash; a heavy drawstring coin pouch held forward in one hand; a packed bedroll and waterskin slung diagonally across the back.

A wandering ronin, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a wide woven straw amigasa hat tilted low so the brim casts full shadow over the face; wearing a faded kimono over a battered dō chest cuirass with the breast laces hanging loose; a katana sheathed at the left hip with the hand resting on the saya; a bedroll and tea-flask slung at the back.

A hooded crypto trader, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a deep merchant's cowl pulled low and a folded paper bandana drawn up over the mouth; wearing a worn long merchant's coat with a wide sash; two limp parchments held forward in one hand; a battered courier satchel hung at the hip.

A Macedonian king, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall plumed Phrygian helmet whose brow band casts full shadow over the face; wearing a scaled linothorax over a short tunic; kopis sword raised high in the right hand; military cloak swept dramatically behind.

A Roman dictator-general, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a polished crested galea wrapped with a laurel wreath, the visor a dark band; wearing a sculpted muscle cuirass with a draped imperial paludamentum mantle; a gladius held level in the right hand; a rolled marshal's scroll tucked under the left arm.

A Spartan king, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a transverse-crested Corinthian helm whose T-slot visor leaves only deep shadow where the face would be; wearing a bronze muscle cuirass over a short red tunic with leather pteruges; a long dory spear held upright at the right shoulder; a great round bronze aspis shield strapped to the left arm.

An Egyptian pharaoh-queen, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall golden vulture-and-uraeus crown whose forehead band casts full shadow over the face; wearing a long pleated linen sheath dress with a broad usekh gold-and-lapis collar; a heqa crook scepter held upright in the right hand; a nekhakha flail tucked at the left hip.

A holy maiden-knight, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by an armored bascinet helm with the pointed visor lowered flush, leaving only deep shadow; wearing full polished plate armor under a white surcoat embroidered with a single fleur-de-lis; a tall banner-pole topped with a fleur-de-lis pennant gripped upright in the right hand; an arming sword sheathed at the left hip.

A steppe conqueror, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a fur-lined steppe helm with long iron cheekpieces and a brow band leaving only shadow; wearing a lamellar leather cuirass over a knee-length silk tunic; a curved cavalry saber lowered in the right hand; a recurve war bow and full arrow quiver slung diagonally across the back.

A Carthaginian general, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a Hellenistic Boeotian helm with a tall horsehair crest, the visor a single dark band; wearing a scaled bronze cuirass over a short tunic; a curved falcata sword held forward in the right hand; a long campaign cloak swept dramatically behind.

A Norse thunder-god, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a winged iron helm with a broad nose-guard and braided cheek-plates leaving only shadow; wearing chainmail belted with a heavy gilded girdle of strength; a short-hafted war hammer raised high in the right hand crackling with lightning; a thick fur cloak clasped at the throat.

A Han-era scholar-strategist, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a tall scholar's futou headpiece and a wide silk veil drawn across the lower face; wearing a long-sleeved flowing scholar's robe with embroidered borders; a feathered crane-fan held up before the chest; a rolled bamboo war-strategy scroll tucked at the hip sash.

A Norse all-father, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a deep traveler's cowl beneath a wide-brimmed wanderer's hat, the brim casting full shadow over the face; wearing a long fur-trimmed wool cloak fastened with a great brooch over a knee-length tunic; a tall ash-wood spear gripped upright in the right hand; a great wolf-pelt mantle clasped at the throat and falling to the knees.

A druidic mage-counselor, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a deep pointed wizard's hood and a long beard veil that together cover everything above the chest, leaving only shadow; wearing a long star-strewn robe belted with a runed cord and a heavy travel cloak; a tall gnarled oak staff topped with a single faceted crystal gripped upright in the right hand; a heavy leather-bound spellbook tucked under the left arm.

A philosopher-emperor warrior, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a polished crested galea with a hinged face-mask lowered into place leaving only deep shadow; wearing a sculpted muscle cuirass over a kilt of leather pteruges with a draped imperial paludamentum mantle; a long spatha sword held level in the right hand; a rolled meditations scroll tucked under the left arm.

A Sumerian king-hero, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall lapis-and-gold ceremonial diadem whose front plate hangs down as a brow band leaving only shadow where the face would be; wearing a long pleated wool kaunakes robe banded with gold appliqué at the chest; a curved bronze sickle-sword raised level in the right hand; a heavy cedar-haft war mace slung at the hip.

A Japanese sun-goddess, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall golden sun-disc diadem and a long sheer white silk veil cascading down over the face; wearing a flowing white-and-gold many-layered jūnihitoe court robe embroidered with a radiant sun motif at the chest; a round polished bronze sacred mirror held up before the chest in both hands; a long ceremonial tasseled fan tucked at the obi sash.

A titan firebringer, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a heavy laurel-wreath crown wrapped with strips of torn cloth that fall as a veil over the face; wearing a torn classical chiton draped over one shoulder with broken iron chains hanging from the wrists; a great burning torch held aloft in the raised right hand; the remnants of a shattered iron chain coiled and slung at the left hip.
